title: WYSIWYG
description: The AXWysiwyg class is a wrapper around the Quill rich text editor, designed to simplify its usage in ACorex library. This class provides an easy way to initialize a Quill editor within a specified container and apply various formatting options such as bold, italic, underline, strike-through, font color, text alignment, and more. It also includes methods to manipulate text direction, font size, and background color. Users can insert images, and undo/redo changes using the integrated history features of Quill. The HTMLoutput getter provides access to the HTML content of the editor. The class enhances usability by offering a clean API for interacting with the Quill editor within Angular applications.

sections.title: Usage
sections.description: A simple example of using AXWysiwyg class

props.name: quillObj
props.description: A signal containing the Quill editor instance or null if not initialized.

methods.content:
/**
 * Initializes the Quill editor within the specified container.
 *
 * @param container - The HTML element or selector string where the editor should be initialized
 * @param option - Optional Quill configuration options
 * @returns Promise that resolves when the editor is initialized
 *
 * @example
 * ```typescript
 * const wysiwyg = new AXWysiwyg();
 * await wysiwyg.init('#editor', { readOnly: true });
 * ```
 */
async init(container: HTMLElement | string, option?: WysiwygOptions): Promise<void>

/**
 * Applies or removes bold formatting to the selected text.
 *
 * @param value - True to apply bold formatting, false to remove it
 *
 * @example
 * ```typescript
 * wysiwyg.bold(true); // Apply bold
 * wysiwyg.bold(false); // Remove bold
 * ```
 */
bold(value: boolean): void

/**
 * Applies or removes italic formatting to the selected text.
 *
 * @param value - True to apply italic formatting, false to remove it
 *
 * @example
 * ```typescript
 * wysiwyg.italic(true); // Apply italic
 * wysiwyg.italic(false); // Remove italic
 * ```
 */
italic(value: boolean): void

/**
 * Applies or removes underline formatting to the selected text.
 *
 * @param value - True to apply underline formatting, false to remove it
 *
 * @example
 * ```typescript
 * wysiwyg.underLine(true); // Apply underline
 * wysiwyg.underLine(false); // Remove underline
 * ```
 */
underLine(value: boolean): void

/**
 * Applies or removes strikethrough formatting to the selected text.
 *
 * @param value - True to apply strikethrough formatting, false to remove it
 *
 * @example
 * ```typescript
 * wysiwyg.strike(true); // Apply strikethrough
 * wysiwyg.strike(false); // Remove strikethrough
 * ```
 */
strike(value: boolean): void

/**
 * Sets the text color for the selected text.
 *
 * @param value - The color value (hex, rgb, or named color)
 *
 * @example
 * ```typescript
 * wysiwyg.color('#ff0000'); // Red color
 * wysiwyg.color('blue'); // Named color
 * ```
 */
color(value: string): void

/**
 * Sets the header level for the selected text.
 *
 * @param value - The header level (1-6, where 1 is the largest)
 *
 * @example
 * ```typescript
 * wysiwyg.header(1); // H1
 * wysiwyg.header(2); // H2
 * wysiwyg.header(0); // Remove header
 * ```
 */
header(value: number): void

/**
 * Applies list formatting to the selected text.
 *
 * @param value - The list type: 'ordered' for numbered list, 'bullet' for bullet list, or '' to remove list formatting
 *
 * @example
 * ```typescript
 * wysiwyg.list('ordered'); // Numbered list
 * wysiwyg.list('bullet'); // Bullet list
 * wysiwyg.list(''); // Remove list
 * ```
 */
list(value: 'ordered' | 'bullet' | ''): void

/**
 * Sets the text alignment for the selected text.
 *
 * @param value - The alignment type: 'left', 'center', 'right', or 'justify'
 *
 * @example
 * ```typescript
 * wysiwyg.align('center'); // Center align
 * wysiwyg.align('right'); // Right align
 * wysiwyg.align('left'); // Left align (default)
 * wysiwyg.align('justify'); // Justify text
 * ```
 */
align(value: 'center' | 'right' | 'left' | 'justify'): void

/**
 * Sets the text direction for the selected text.
 *
 * @param value - The text direction: 'rtl' for right-to-left or 'ltr' for left-to-right
 *
 * @example
 * ```typescript
 * wysiwyg.direction('rtl'); // Right-to-left
 * wysiwyg.direction('ltr'); // Left-to-right
 * ```
 */
direction(value: 'rtl' | 'ltr'): void

/**
 * Sets the font size for the selected text within a specific range.
 *
 * @param value - The font size: 'small', false (normal), 'large', or 'huge'
 * @param range - The text range object with index and length properties
 *
 * @example
 * ```typescript
 * wysiwyg.fontSize('large', { index: 0, length: 10 });
 * wysiwyg.fontSize(false, { index: 0, length: 5 }); // Normal size
 * ```
 */
fontSize(value: 'small' | false | 'large' | 'huge', range: { index: number; length: number }): void

/** * Gets the HTML content of the editor. * * @returns The HTML string representation of the editor content * * @example * ```typescript * const htmlContent = wysiwyg.HTMLoutput; * console.log(htmlContent); //

Formatted text content

* ``` */ get HTMLoutput(): string

/**
 * Undoes the last change in the editor.
 *
 * @example
 * ```typescript
 * wysiwyg.undo(); // Undo last action
 * ```
 */
undo(): void

/**
 * Redoes the last undone change in the editor.
 *
 * @example
 * ```typescript
 * wysiwyg.redo(); // Redo last undone action
 * ```
 */
redo(): void

/**
 * Sets the background color for the selected text.
 *
 * @param value - The background color value (hex, rgb, or named color)
 *
 * @example
 * ```typescript
 * wysiwyg.background('#ffff00'); // Yellow background
 * wysiwyg.background('lightblue'); // Named color
 * ```
 */
background(value: string): void

/**
 * Inserts an image at the current cursor position.
 *
 * @param value - The image URL or data URI
 *
 * @example
 * ```typescript
 * wysiwyg.addImage('https://example.com/image.jpg');
 * wysiwyg.addImage('data:image/png;base64,iVBORw0KGgoAAAANSUhEUgAA...');
 * ```
 */
addImage(value: string): void

/**
 * Focuses the editor.
 *
 * @example
 * ```typescript
 * wysiwyg.focus(); // Focus the editor
 * ```
 */
focus(): void

/**
 * Removes focus from the editor.
 *
 * @example
 * ```typescript
 * wysiwyg.blur(); // Remove focus from editor
 * ```
 */
blur(): void
